description.plain: All-terrain trail running shoe with carbon plate and waterproof upper.
Trail Runner Pro in size 9, blue colorway.

highlights.statement: Carbon plate returns energy through the gait cycle for less fatigue on long runs.
Fully waterproof upper rated to IPX7, tested in mixed-weather conditions.

qa_pairs.question: Do these run true to size?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes — the Trail Runner Pro fits true to size for most runners; consider sizing down half a size if you have a narrow forefoot.

qa_pairs.question: How do I clean them after a muddy run?
qa_pairs.answer: Rinse with cool water, remove the insole, and air-dry away from direct heat. Avoid machine washing.

use_cases.scenario: Weekend trail running in mixed weather
use_cases.persona: Intermediate runner training for an ultramarathon
use_cases.context: Rocky and muddy single-track, 20-40 km outings
use_cases.outcome: Stable footing on technical terrain with energy return that holds up through hour three.

use_cases.scenario: Daily commute on wet city streets
use_cases.persona: Urban runner who commutes by foot
use_cases.context: Mixed pavement and gravel paths in autumn rain
use_cases.outcome: Dry feet for the full commute and grip on wet surfaces.

differentiators.claim: 40% lighter than the previous generation while keeping the same drop and stack height.
Carbon plate placement gives 8% more energy return than the category average in lab tests.

description.plain: Lightweight road racing shoe optimized for marathon distance.

highlights.statement: 230 g half-pair weight — among the lightest in its road-racing class.
Single-density foam tuned for marathon-pace cadence.

qa_pairs.question: Is this shoe suitable for daily training?
qa_pairs.answer: Not recommended — the Aero Road Shoe is tuned for race days and tempo sessions. For daily mileage, consider a higher-stack training shoe.

qa_pairs.question: What's the return policy?
qa_pairs.answer: 30-day returns on unworn shoes; once they touch pavement the sale is final.

use_cases.context: Flat road course in cool weather
use_cases.outcome: Consistent cadence with minimal late-race foot fatigue.

use_cases.scenario: Weekly tempo sessions on the track
use_cases.outcome: Race-specific neuromuscular adaptation without burning out a daily trainer.

differentiators.claim: 30 g lighter than the closest competitor in the marathon racing category.
Stack height meets the industry standard for World Athletics-legal road racing.
